About Me

About Me

I'm Muhammed Hakim, an AI & Software Engineer

Muhammed Hakim is a Computer Engineering graduate and currently pursuing a Master's degree in Software Engineering with a specialization in Artificial Intelligence at Fırat University, Turkey. Passionate about building intelligent systems and modern web applications.

My goal is to bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and real-world software solutions — turning complex ideas into accessible, impactful applications.

Email:mhakim.contact@gmail.com

My Projects

A collection of projects that reflect my passion for AI, software engineering, and web development.

🛒

Product Management System

Full-stack product management app with SQL database. Backend built with C# and frontend with React + TypeScript — featuring full CRUD operations and a clean UI.

View Project
🎨

AI Image Generation (GAN / VAE / AE)

Generates images of digits and fashion items using deep learning models — GAN, VAE, and AE — with a comparative analysis of the results from each model.

View Project
🍽️

Restaurant Ordering Website

A modern restaurant order interface built with React + TypeScript, connected to Sanity CMS for dynamic content management and menu handling.

View Project
🎬

NLP – Movie Review Sentiment Analysis

A deep learning NLP model that classifies movie reviews as positive or negative, trained on real-world review datasets for sentiment understanding.

View Project
📰

NLP – News Category Classifier

An NLP model that automatically classifies news articles into categories — political, sports, economic, or weather — using machine learning and deep learning techniques.

View Project
🤖

Custom Chatbot with Fine-Tuning

A specialized chatbot fine-tuned to answer only from a custom JSON knowledge base, with a built-in user interface powered by Gradio.

View Project
